name: How Palm Beach Tan’s Improved Digital Profiles Increased Store Visits by 218%
client_challenge: Palm Beach Tan was struggling to keep up with managing the profiles and digital marketing for their hundreds of locations nationwide. They had great offerings and a stellar line of products, but struggled to increase awareness of their product line.
highlight:
Palm Beach Tan is beloved around the country for their premium tanning services, from red-light therapies to tanning beds. But they were struggling with brand awareness and digital profile management.

‍

Palm Beach Tan wanted to get more exposure for their brand through Google search.
client_solution:
Palm Beach Tan invested in Synup to improve their digital profiles: spotlighting products, producing landing pages for each location, and adding more details to their listings. Plus, they needed one hub to seamlessly manage all of their digital profiles on one platform.

‍

Using Synup, Palm Beach Tan now has incredible, standardized digital profiles for all of their locations. Synup empowered Palm Beach Tan to customize their digital profiles across locations and platforms, focusing specifically on their Google Business Profiles.

‍

By localizing their Google Business Profiles, Palm Beach Tan could properly advertise and promote their product line on Google.
the_difference:
‍

Specifically, Palm Beach Tan saw incredible growth from using Synup Campaigns, with their profile views and website clicks increasing by nearly 150%. 

Synup Campaigns enabled Palm Beach Tan to spotlight special store promotions - encouraging first-time customers to come and try them out. As a result, Palm Beach Tan saw a 218% increase in store visits. 

‍

Palm Beach Tan used Campaign to:

  • Create custom landing pages for different store locations
  • Spotlight store promotions
  • Raise awareness of product line

seo.title: How Palm Beach Tan’s Improved Digital Profiles Increased Store Visits by 218%
